items.quote: Mel is the only person I trust with my hair. She takes her time, checks in during the install, and the result is always exactly what I asked for. My knotless braids lasted 7 weeks and still looked neat.
items.author: Aisha T.

items.quote: I came in for a consultation not knowing what I wanted, and Mel helped me figure out the perfect style for my hair texture and lifestyle. Ended up with feed-in cornrows and I've gotten so many compliments.
items.author: Brianna M.

items.quote: Jordan did my box braids and was so fast and gentle. My edges are completely intact. I'll be back every 6 weeks!
items.author: Kezia R.

items.quote: I have sensitive edges and have had bad experiences before. Nia was so careful and patient — I fell asleep in the chair because I was so relaxed. My retwist looked perfect.
items.author: Dominique W.

items.quote: The boho twists I got here are STUNNING. The photos don't do justice. I get stopped on the street every week. Worth every penny and every hour in the chair.
items.author: Tanya J.

items.quote: I've been coming to Mel since 2019 and won't go anywhere else. She remembers my hair history, suggests what's best for its health, and is just a genuinely kind person to spend the day with.
items.author: Camille O.

items.quote: The booking process was so smooth and the studio is clean and welcoming. Mel confirmed all details upfront — no surprises. My daughter and I both got our hair done and left feeling like queens.
items.author: Renee & Jade F.

items.quote: Finally found someone who does starter locs properly! Nia explained every step and gave me an amazing aftercare kit and guide. My locs are thriving.
items.author: Marcus L.

items.quote: Quick, clean, and affordable. My feed-in cornrows are always exactly what I need for work — professional and polished. Jordan finishes in record time without sacrificing quality.
items.author: Simone P.
